title: Closed Public Route Simplification
summary: Centralized public catalogue route construction around fixed shells and query-state routes, removed derivable public URL fields from Studio moment previews and catalogue search entries, and added checked-in public route smoke coverage.
effect: The later public static-site builder can consume a smaller explicit route contract without preserving old per-record work, series, or work-detail paths; remaining Jekyll collection outputs are documented as temporary build-layer artifacts.
verification: Python syntax checks passed for changed Python smoke, builder, and service files.
Focused pytest passed for catalogue search builder, generated-output contract fixtures, and Docs Viewer semantic reference generation.
Jekyll built to /tmp/dlf-jekyll-build with the configured rbenv Bundler path.
Public route simplification, public work runtime, catalogue search runtime, Studio navigation adapter, Studio catalogue editor route, and catalogue moment modal smokes passed.
Focused stale-route scans found no active generated catalogue search href fields and no Library or Analysis plain links to retired public catalogue paths.
